Patch Set 2:

> How about changing llapi_fid_parse() to return the number of
 > characters in the fid, or pointer past the fid?

This doesn't seem possible/practical with sscanf(), but I was thinking about this again and it would be possible to implement this by calling strtoull() for each component separately, and skipping the intermediate ':' separators.
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 6:

Sorry for the spam, I was doing the wrong thing during a rebase and accidentally merged the later patches in the series into the first patch.

This is now ready for re-review after adding in the changes from Olaf.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

(6 comments)

Some questions and comments, but looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-9679 modules: declare zero-arg functions correctly

commit.subject: LU-11380 llapi: add llapi_fid_parse() helper
commit.message:
LU-11380 llapi: add llapi_fid_parse() helper

Split the llapi_* FID handling functions to a separate file
rather than continually increasing the size of liblustrepai.c.

Add llapi_fid_parse() to parse a string to binary struct lu_fid.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I15abfaf888a5474d62feebab4e8db543ba3ebbe5
